verses.1: Of the children of Ammon. The LORD says:
verses.3: “Wail, Heshbon, for Ai is laid waste!
verses.4: Why do you boast in the valleys,
verses.5: Behold, I will bring a terror on you,”
verses.6: “But afterward I will reverse the captivity of the children of Ammon,”
verses.7: Of Edom, the LORD of Armies says:
verses.9: If grape gatherers came to you,
verses.10: But I have made Esau bare,
verses.12: For the LORD says: “Behold, they to whom it didn’t pertain to drink of the cup will certainly drink; and are you he who will altogether go unpunished? You won’t go unpunished, but you will surely drink.
verses.13: For I have sworn by myself,” says the LORD, “that Bozrah will become an astonishment, a reproach, a waste, and a curse. All its cities will be perpetual wastes.”
verses.14: I have heard news from the LORD,
verses.15: “For, behold, I have made you small among the nations,
verses.18: As in the overthrow of Sodom and Gomorrah and its neighbor cities,” says the LORD,
verses.19: “Behold, he will come up like a lion from the pride of the Jordan against the strong habitation;
verses.20: Therefore hear the counsel of the LORD, that he has taken against Edom,
verses.21: The earth trembles at the noise of their fall;
verses.22: Behold, he will come up and fly as the eagle,
verses.25: How is the city of praise not forsaken,
verses.26: Therefore her young men will fall in her streets,
verses.27: “I will kindle a fire in the wall of Damascus,
verses.28: Of Kedar, and of the kingdoms of Hazor, which Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon struck, The LORD says:
verses.29: They will take their tents and their flocks.
verses.31: Arise! Go up to a nation that is at ease,
verses.32: Their camels will be a booty,
verses.33: Hazor will be a dwelling place of jackals,
verses.34: The LORD’s word that came to Jeremiah the prophet concerning Elam, in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah, saying,
verses.36: I will bring on Elam the four winds from the four quarters of the sky,
verses.37: I will cause Elam to be dismayed before their enemies,
verses.38: I will set my throne in Elam,
verses.39: ‘But it will happen in the latter days
